info.title: arXiv API
info.description: The arXiv API allows programmatic access to the e-print metadata on arXiv.org. It provides a search/query interface that returns results in Atom 1.0 format. The API can be used to search for articles, retrieve metadata, and access full-text content.

get.description: Search for articles on arXiv using a query string. Supports field-specific searches (ti, au, abs, co, jr, cat, rn, id, all) and boolean operators (AND, OR, ANDNOT). Results are returned in Atom 1.0 XML format.

parameters.name: search_query
parameters.description: Search query using arXiv query syntax. Supports prefix:term format where prefix can be ti (title), au (author), abs (abstract), co (comment), jr (journal reference), cat (subject category), rn (report number), id (arXiv ID), all (all fields). Boolean operators: AND, OR, ANDNOT. Example: au:del_maestro+AND+ti:checkerboard

parameters.name: id_list
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of arXiv IDs to retrieve. Example: 0710.5765v1,0## .5766v1

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start index for returned results (0-based). Used for pagination.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 10.

200.description: Atom 1.0 XML feed containing search results with article metadata including title, authors, abstract, categories, links to PDF and HTML versions, published and updated dates.
